source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4
distilled_thesis: Blessing appears here as reciprocal rather than unilateral, because overflow and reception answer one another within the same bounded movement.
